omitted_declarations.policy_reference: (iii) The Company may use third-party advertising companies to serve ads when the User(s) visit the Company's Website(s)/Mobile Application(s). These companies may use Personal Information (non-sensitive personal information only) about the User(s) visit to the Company's Website(s)/Mobile Application(s) and other third party websites in order to provide advertisements about goods and services of interest to any particular User(s).
